race.comment: VICTORY QUEEN (8) did her best work late to score last start over 1300m at Bordertown at the second run this prep. Is open to further improvement third-up and finds the right race to make it two on the bounce. PRIVATE JET (5) hasn't been as effective in his last two after kicking off the prep with two encouraging efforts. Drawn sticky but is worth another chance. PUNCHIN (1) finished at the rear of the field when last sighted tackling tougher opposition back in Feb. His form earlier in the prep measures up well for this and a Morph Parks trial in readiness should have him forward enough to run a big race. ASTRODEAN (6) improved nicely second-up when chasing gamely into second in the slop at Bordertown. Can improve again over this trip. BADONKIDONK (2) mixed his form through last campaign but his peak figures are up to this. Resumes short of a preferred trip but reunites with his regular hoop in Crowther. One to keep safe in the minors.
